Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x04AE "IMPOSSIBLEMISSION-0581-04AE" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0581 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Impossible Mission.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0581 which: 1. Sets values on the stack between $01FC and $01FE to allow the game to run correctly. 2. Jumps to the entry point at $04AE (it couldn't use RTS because of the stack manipulation above).
The loading screen was taken from the disk version.
